creator: bsdkaffee@gmail.com
text:
Take maintainership of the following ports:
audio/libtunepimp
audio/picard
audio/py-libtunepimp
audio/py-musicbrainz2

I currently maintain audio/libmusicbrainz*, audio/py-musicbrainz, 
and audio/libdiscid so these other Musicbrainz-related ports will be
well looked after.

How-To-Repeat: Use attached diff.
